failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Solid formation due to incomplete quenching
failure_modes.mitigation: Ensure complete quenching and regular maintenance of BPR

failure_modes.cause: Localized overheating due to exothermic reaction
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement temperature monitoring and control system

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Perform reaction at full scale with temperature sensors along the tubing to detect hotspots
Conduct quenching efficiency test to ensure no solid formation post-reaction
